lead_id.description: Reference to the Lead record this feedback is about (nullable if no lead matched)

buyer_id.description: Reference to the Buyer record that submitted this feedback

matched_by.description: How the lead was matched: phone, email, or manual (added in portal)

disposition.description: Mapped disposition from our taxonomy (e.g. Converted, Wrong Number)

raw_disposition.description: The buyer's own free text or code before AI mapping

outcome.description: Short outcome summary provided by the buyer

revenue_value.description: Revenue value the buyer attributes to this lead, if any

source.description: manual = added in the portal, webhook = posted to the feedback endpoint

match_confidence.description: AI mapping confidence 0-1 for the raw->taxonomy disposition mapping
